B

BaseController - Class in client.view
Lifecycle base for screens that participate in the realtime push channel.
BaseController(NetworkService) - Constructor for class client.view.BaseController
Creates the controller with the shared network service.
bindNavButton(String, Button) - Method in class client.app.Navigator
Associates a sidebar button with a screen id and wires its click to navigate there.
body - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Human-readable message body.
bodyFor(int) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Selects the body node for a wizard step.
bookBtn - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Submits the booking.
buildBody() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Returns the split-pane body: controls/scheduler on the left, clients/log on the right.
buildCard() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Returns a blank styled card container.
buildClientsCard() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Returns the connected-clients card with its table.
buildControlCard() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Returns the server-controls card (port, password, start/stop, reachable-at).
buildInputs() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Prefills + configures the step-1 controls from the reservation.
buildLogBox() - Static method in class client.view.Widgets
Creates an empty activity log container.
buildLogCard() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Returns the activity-log card with its scrollable list.
buildNavButton(String, String) - Static method in class client.app.Navigator
Builds a sidebar nav button styled by client.css, with the icon and label laid out side by side.
buildPrimaryButton(String, String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Builds a primary (filled) button with an icon and hover styling.
buildQuickLoginButtons() - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Builds one quick-login button per seeded account into the quick-login row.
buildSchedulerButton(String, Supplier<String>) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Creates a full-width scheduler trigger button.
buildSchedulerCard() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Builds the scheduler control card: one "run now" button per timed job plus a "Run all jobs now" button.
buildSecondaryButton(String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Builds a secondary (outlined) button with hover styling.
buildSecondaryButtonCompact(String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Smaller secondary button — used for the two-per-line scheduler triggers.
buildStepIndicator(int, String[]) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Builds the step indicator for the edit wizard, mirroring the old Update-Order wizard: a row of numbered circles + captions joined by connector lines, with completed steps ticked and the active one highlighted.
buildToastLabel() - Static method in class client.view.Widgets
A blank invisible label, marked .toast — call Widgets.showToast(javafx.scene.control.Label, boolean, java.lang.String) to use.
buildTopbar() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Returns the header bar with the logo, title, and status pill.
